film.title: I Love You, Beth Cooper
film.overview: A valedictorian's declaration of love for a high-school cheerleader launches a night of revelry, reflection and romance for a group of graduating seniors.

dialogues.dialogue: - Neither did you. - I tried.  Patty Keck?  - Her, yes. - Your secret shame.  My point is... I had one.  Just so you know, making out with a girl like that, I'm not sure that's not gay.
dialogues.cause_raw: being considered as a shameful secret

dialogues.dialogue: Your new hopeless obsession might be at this very party.  Denny!  Oh, secret shame.  This is so great. I didn't expect to see you here.  Patty.
And... ...fight.  ...fight.  Cooverman, Bison pride.  No, I'm not gonna fight him.  Don't be such a p***y, p***y. Come on.

I don't know.  Guess it was the way other girls looked at me when I was with him.  I felt proud.  Thought I was the lucky girl this big, strong Army guy chose.  - It didn't bother you that he was an a...? - An a*****e?
dialogues.cause_raw: being chosen by a strong Army guy
